headlineFeatures.title: Passenger seat — ride together in vehicles
headlineFeatures.summary: Both players in the same vehicle during the driving parts. The Road Trip back seats are already in — press F12 to buckle in. The Pizzeria drive-in and the Cabin intro drive are next.

headlineFeatures.title: Mid-game save & resume
headlineFeatures.summary: Save together and pick up later from the same point, instead of both starting a chapter from the start.

headlineFeatures.title: Synced death & ending
headlineFeatures.summary: If one of you dies or reaches the credits, the other follows — no one gets left stranded.

unsyncedScenes.name: Menus & loading
unsyncedScenes.impact: Lobby/menu choices aren't shared yet — set up the session in-game with F11.

unsyncedScenes.name: Death & end credits
unsyncedScenes.impact: If one player dies or finishes, the other doesn't follow automatically yet.

unsyncedScenes.name: Dark cabin — deeper beats
unsyncedScenes.impact: The dark return-to-cabin run is in; a few of its later moments still need polish.

milestones.title: Playable end to end
milestones.subtitle: A full, clean run you can stream

milestones.title: Ride-along
milestones.subtitle: Both players in the same vehicle for the drives
